title: VDeleteSequence Method, Spel Class
parameters: Sequence	String expression containing the name of a vision sequence in the current EPSON RC+ project.
description: Deletes a vision sequence in the current project.
see_also:
VCreateObject

VCreateSequence

VDeleteObject

VDeleteSequence Example

VB Example:

m_spel.VDeleteSequence("myseq")

C# Example:

m_spel.VDeleteSequence("myseq");
